headline: Key Catalysts Behind Salesforce’s (CRM) Compelling Outlook
summary: Montaka Global Investments, an investment management company, released its second-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the update is available to download here. Montaka manages a concentrated portfolio of high–conviction, long-term, competitively advantaged businesses bought when prices are attractive. headline: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: Salesforce, Atlassian and Workday
summary: Salesforce, Atlassian and Workday have rebounded as AI-driven growth metrics and recent business performance shift attention from earlier concerns.

headline: Acxiom Debuts Industry-First Identity Boost Solution
summary: CONWAY, Ark., July 23, 2026--Acxiom®, the connected data and technology foundation for the world’s leading brands, today announced the launch of the Identity Boost Accelerator powered by Real ID. This new solution brings together Salesforce’s Data 360 and Acxiom's identity resolution to securely connect fragmented identity signals and enrich customer profiles with verified data and insights while maintaining privacy and security.

raw.headline: Acxiom Debuts Industry-First Identity Boost Solution

headline: E-Commerce Update - Accelerating Growth Transforming Global Fulfillment Services
summary: The global e-commerce fulfillment services market is projected to grow from USD 154.11 billion in 2026 to USD 304.04 billion by 2032, reflecting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 11.73%. Key drivers of this growth include advancements in artificial intelligence, warehouse automation, and distributed omnichannel networks, which enhance delivery speed, cost management, and customer service. The market is evolving with a focus on balancing factors such as delivery resilience, regulatory...

headline: Verizon Was Booted From the Dow – 5 Dividend Giants Got the Same Treatment and Eventually Soared
summary: Getting kicked off the Dow Jones Industrial Average sounds like a death sentence for a stock, but a handful of booted dividend giants went on to reward patient shareholders with stunning gains and steady income streams that index investors missed out on entirely.
